creator: richardt@maths.tcd.ie
text:
FreeBSD bloch.maths.tcd.ie 11.2-PRERELEASE FreeBSD 11.2-PRERELEASE #14 r334205:335129: Thu Jun 14 14:48:30 IST 2018     richardt@temp2.maths.tcd.ie:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

Hardware:
CPU: Intel(R) Core(TM)2 Quad CPU    Q9650  @ 3.00GHz (2992.56-MHz K8-class CPU)
FreeBSD/SMP: Multiprocessor System Detected: 4 CPUs

dmesg | grep fpudna | sort -u
fpudna: fpcurthread == curthread

New messages with 11.2-PRERELEASE. System appears stable as far as I can see but the messages probably should not be there.

I have the same kernel running on a virtual machine (where the actual hardware is CPU: AMD Opteron(tm) Processor 6166 HE (1800.07-MHz K8-class CPU)) and I don't see the same messages.

From /var/log/messages:
